_comment_csp: TODO: CSP strict-dynamic requires nonce-based script loading. This means generating a unique nonce per request (needs a serverless middleware or edge function to inject it into both the CSP header and every <script> tag). Too invasive for the current static-deploy architecture — revisit when migrating to SSR or adding a Vercel Edge Middleware layer.

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://www.googletagmanager.com https://va.vercel-scripts.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob:; connect-src 'self' https://api.anthropic.com https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com https://api.openai.com https://api.stripe.com https://loresync.dev https://*.ingest.sentry.io https://www.googletagmanager.com https://www.google-analytics.com https://va.vercel-scripts.com; frame-src https://js.stripe.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self';
